description: Marketing email. Used for drip sequences, launch announcements, founder updates, and campaign nurture flows.

subject.description: Email subject line. Aim for 6-10 words. Must be compelling enough to open.

preheader.description: Preview text shown after subject in inbox. Complements but doesn't repeat the subject.

body.description: Email body copy. Plain text or light HTML. Structured: hook → story/proof → CTA.

cta.description: Primary call-to-action text and destination. Clear, single action.

sender_name.description: From name. Personal name for founder-voice, brand name for announcements.
